query:
SELECT a.id, a.profissionalId, a.data, a.horaInicio, a.horaFim, a.status, a.clienteId,
       ai.profissionalId as itemProfissionalId, ai.horaInicio as itemHoraInicio, ai.horaFim as itemHoraFim
FROM agendamentos a
LEFT JOIN agendamento_itens ai ON ai.agendamentoId = a.id
WHERE a.data = '2026-05-27'
ORDER BY a.horaInicio;
